characters.name: Darwin (Velvet)
characters.description: Genetically engineered Velociraptor, ~7 feet tall, iridescent feathers, large expressive intelligent eyes, hyper-refined sense of smell, gentle and curious, learns human connection, becomes tea sommelier

characters.name: Maya Chen
characters.description: Late 30s, burnt-out widow, sarcastic but warm heart, runs failing tea shop, speaks to plants, former zoology student, takes in Darwin, discovers his talent

characters.name: Dr. Sarah Chen
characters.description: 40s, guilt-ridden geneticist who created Darwin, works at Nexus BioTech, tracks him to Portland, becomes ally

characters.name: Director Moss
characters.description: 50s, cold corporate enforcer from Nexus BioTech, wants to reclaim Darwin

characters.name: Victor Hale
characters.description: Rival tea shop owner, business rival, eventually becomes friend

characters.name: Inspector Linda Torres
characters.description: Health inspector, pragmatic and fair, becomes ally

characters.name: Mrs. Patterson
characters.description: Elderly regular customer, warm community member

locations.name: Nexus BioTech Lab
locations.description: Shady underground lab, dark corridors, blue neon, high-tech, sterile

locations.name: Steep & Leaf Tea Shop
locations.description: Failing Portland tea shop, cozy cluttered, warm amber light, tea canisters, chalkboard

locations.name: Portland Streets
locations.description: Rainy night streets, neon signs, urban atmosphere

locations.name: Oregon Zoo Sanctuary
locations.description: Custom habitat for Darwin, natural lighting, safe environment

do: Warm amber/golden light for tea shop scenes
Show Darwin with large vulnerable intelligent eyes
Include tea canisters, chalkboards, brewing equipment
dont: No scary lab imagery in tea shop
